Cory Sent from my iPhone

America deserves better.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=052c0dd6c825444db583bd823f23071c&_e=oEdeUc9iNIvAVzPA9usW5JuxvybxAouot22ofdgkl8pTvwg2LvKVz-OvXOj6fF9Ms0g2g18q2griNN6U2YnfO90on7mi9PITFBWTHggyJVMOhskbKKoCXyJyAhCXs7lsTunK56CFW9ykNxyoM_gZAsF9cXFvYV2h-CFbhwiApLDLI1fiNagSF2DRWiIKxTdC3IdKh2PF3ywwohjuPWTYDy6lzpFXqwygCtJ9Xg1D59n8yOXUpZFBC9iqGOKPSNKat3IXMzmyrDW-OjKwnVljjkuGUUXzI9uSvc7pJxPVXdwNBPd3QkdhMBKsLKMXB_xODwVwE20OIn4562EfphAXZtPz6F_-VP-1ptnXvCJxPWnI4ExhD1VZXvXcnoQ8Wyp8N7DKPx4DrhNZMlkvJQN77A%3D%3D) friend -- Earlier this week the Centers for Disease Control told Americans to prepare for the spread of coronavirus in their communities. Here's what Donald Trump said: "We'll see what happens. Nobody really knows." With this president, "Nobody really knows" says it all. "Nobody really knows" because Donald Trump slashed funding of the CDC and other essential health agencies. "Nobody really knows" because Donald Trump eliminated the White House chain of command tasked with responding to a pandemic. "Nobody really knows" because this administration has waged a war on science, the press, and the institutions that keep us safe and informed. "Nobody really knows" because no one can ever really know what this erratic, unstable president is going to do. [**If you think the American people deserve better, sign your name to help us put a real leader in the White House.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=052c0dd6c825444db583bd823f23071c&_e=oEdeUc9iNIvAVzPA9usW5JuxvybxAouot22ofdgkl8pTvwg2LvKVz-OvXOj6fF9Ms0g2g18q2griNN6U2YnfO90on7mi9PITFBWTHggyJVMOhskbKKoCXyJyAhCXs7lsTunK56CFW9ykNxyoM_gZAsF9cXFvYV2h-CFbhwiApLDzapiwiybAEeQGioWRE95W2qa0RXuHrfMqPdWhlBGLwurXCRPOMTGSq_JUMu1CdwUpHdFkOAsbkIXCoesjRuV0HJ9FqjfEAJRCAI4if_VHpZ8gCB9mTo0BzhWHoI16o6qlEf-Kmido3fL2vXMjzJb3sWw-d9Bsf8qb0U5aD0ekZLmDQ1-x-46hJGIPkI5uwdfRPhpOkHLx2oshWw0Z4rp0B-a2b0s2jnSgD06hYqnK1w%3D%3D) | [SIGN NOW »](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=052c0dd6c825444db583bd823f23071c&_e=oEdeUc9iNIvAVzPA9usW5JuxvybxAouot22ofdgkl8pTvwg2LvKVz-OvXOj6fF9Ms0g2g18q2griNN6U2YnfO90on7mi9PITFBWTHggyJVMOhskbKKoCXyJyAhCXs7lsTunK56CFW9ykNxyoM_gZAsF9cXFvYV2h-CFbhwiApLCo9UlbUHaB88KLQCuTu41CLmiuk4u9dJ7jSYfF-QUl-KUeGtb98PoHKa6Um37sFOwThA-cn6-w2VLCIZcvF15qR57ladsdA8pYHN1hGrJyFQsW7eKU7wCphpCoXRSgFaE4vFcnZm_oD1HPV76hZV-b_up4Qn4B2zSU5zhObkQbcLiYjHhL-lHbJzniYgCw_plGEVZgUdwqbTSsMZNrL-0G0lVSRj43HepVdWcS3v1z4w%3D%3D)

The true test of leadership is how someone reacts in the most challenging moments. Mike has been tested in the past. He saw New York City through recovery and rebuilding after 9-11. He's been on the frontlines of disaster preparedness and relief efforts. He's mobilized experts and resources to move efficiently and effectively when emergencies arise. He's also put forward a plan to prepare the country for public health crises like this one.
**Sign your name to say that the American people deserve a president who has led during a crisis, believes in science, and listens to advisors, experts, and public health officials:**

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
From the bottom of my heart, to this team, I want to thank you for your support over the past eight months through this presidential race. I am so deeply inspired by how many dedicated Americans showed up to participate in our democracy -- voting in the early states, volunteering countless hours, giving your all to support the candidates and values you believe in. Tonight, I have decided to suspend my campaign for President of the United States. I no longer see a path to the presidency. But I have always said that win, lose, or draw, I am in this fight. So am I going to continue to work on the issues that got me into this race? Yes, I am. You can count on that. Namely, the existential threat of climate change we're facing on this planet. The racial injustice that pervades every single policy issue in this country. An economy that actually puts people ahead of profits and big corporations. We had a very steep hill to climb. We knew it would be difficult to come into this race as an outsider, speaking difficult truths. And of course I am disappointed to suspend my campaign -- these aren't the results we hoped and fought so hard for -- but I will wake up tomorrow energized by this incredible community. I am humbled to be on your team. This primary is a journey towards the necessary defeat of Donald Trump and his corrupt administration. It is because of patriotic Americans like you that we will beat him and put power back in the hands of the people. Before I sign off, let me say this: When the Lord closes a door, He opens a window. I will find that window, and I will crawl through it with you. Yours sincerely,
---
---
Tom Steyer

subject: re: Here's the deal
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Here's the deal. Not only am I on the ballot, but I will be listed as the first choice of Republican primary candidates.
I am the most qualified and best equipped candidate in the field to defeat Rep. Susan Wild and serve the people of Lehigh Valley. The point is this election is mine to win.
But... I need your support. And now, with just weeks until the primary, I need your help more than ever. Can I count on you to donate $100 today?
An immediate contribution will put me in the driver seat for the coming weeks before the primary.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PRfCG8J84uHNDITRT976NkM1WGUMbXXVnqXeDWz-Id9uOoXJFqK-uRipbHP4Wgtx99lyYHBZCZNooKQLls2B2dj_LzFVD96iK-TU6XNtTcTZzSlacDppxhG0CJLY4alV5OYkoYcYo8bgc1Ga43Rv8EzRZROtMc1b99H-aFZ4FTvFdJjSvm8X_g==&c=0z4SeqC-4zPkufyHZEcPoCPuRtx-UYwPF_jkCuaFEPPACMeBiTsYZw==&ch=NHP3c2-5iIdmKSresHDU0i6VKX9NT_xbWdrA_u8t6tH_SYG1jfrj-w==)
---
| There is no doubt in my mind that the people of Lehigh Valley will rally behind a rock-solid conservative candidate to oust Socialist Representative Susan Wild.
But first, we need to win the primary, and looking at a side-by-side comparison, I am the only real Republican who will stand for conservative values and who will be a staunch ally of President Donald J. Trump in his second term. Establishment politicians in the Washington Swamp habitually say one thing while doing another.
Lisa Scheller's first campaign mailer showed she would fit right in if elected.
What Lisa claims she supports, and the hard facts of what she has done are two very different things.
Trust me, actions speak much louder than words.
In 2014, Lisa voted to make Lehigh County a Sanctuary County for dangerous illegal immigrants. (Resolution 2014-36).
This vote prohibits Lehigh County from honoring detainer requests/arrest warrants from ICE unless there is a court order!
Regardless of how Lisa tries to spin things, this policy makes Lehigh County a sanctuary jurisdiction. Her policies have made it more difficult for ICE to do their job and would allow dangerous and illegal criminals to be set free BEFORE THEY CAN BE TAKEN INTO CUSTODY BY ICE.
Now that Lisa is running in a Republican primary, she says she wants to "eliminate sanctuary cities." Yet when "Sanctuary" Scheller was in office, she voted to make Lehigh County a sanctuary county.
We already have one Congresswoman in Washington who says one thing while doing another. Why would we want to replace her with someone who does the same thing? THIS IS WHY WE NEED A REAL CONSERVATIVE TO RUN AGAINST REP. SUSAN WILD!!! , I urge you to donate to my campaign today, so I can win the primary, defeat Susan Wild, and bring conservative values back to our district!!
A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help us win on April 28, 2020! Keep fighting the good fight!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PRfCG8J84uHNDITRT976NkM1WGUMbXXVnqXeDWz-Id9uOoXJFqK-uRipbHP4Wgtx99lyYHBZCZNooKQLls2B2dj_LzFVD96iK-TU6XNtTcTZzSlacDppxhG0CJLY4alV5OYkoYcYo8bgc1Ga43Rv8EzRZROtMc1b99H-aFZ4FTvFdJjSvm8X_g==&c=0z4SeqC-4zPkufyHZEcPoCPuRtx-UYwPF_jkCuaFEPPACMeBiTsYZw==&ch=NHP3c2-5iIdmKSresHDU0i6VKX9NT_xbWdrA_u8t6tH_SYG1jfrj-w==)
---
| For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Have you seen Lisa Scheller's commitment to making Lehigh County a sanctuary city? We need to put an end to fake Republicans and start supporting our President!
A donation of $100, of $50, or even just $25 will help me support President Donald J. Trump in Washington!

body:

They're not wrong...Trump is all in to reelect Susan Collins because she has voted with him 94% of the time! And Mitch McConnell and his allies have already poured big money into her campaign so he can maintain his Senate Majority.

So thanks in advance for chipping in, and thanks for your fight.
All our best,
Team Sara

| | | **LOS ANGELES, IT'S TIME TO VOTE!** Peter Willis, the March 3rd California Primary Election is just TWO DAYS away! Can we count on you to help us take back the House! I need your help! Let's get out and vote from now through Super Tuesday and show America that Republicans are here, ready to take back California!

| **CONSERVATIVE REPUBLICAN, ERROL WEBBER** As a documentary film producer, Iʼve spent the past decade making two dozen social issue-driven documentaries on topics ranging from healthcare and education to human rights and justice. While it is important to raise awareness through documentary filmmaking, even more important is being a catalyst for change and having a seat at the table in public office. I bring a set of fresh eyes when it comes to implementing meaningful legislation, guided by years of world experiences, local knowledge, policy expert advice, and communicating with residents.

name: Progressive Majority
subject: This is exactly why Trump shouldn't be in power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:
|
---

| | In January, NPR's Mary Louise Kelly asked Sec. Mike Pompeo important questions about what the Trump administration was doing in Ukraine. Pompeo erupted at Kelly and later lied about what happened. His administration was caught in a lie, and Trump lashed out. On January 26, he questioned why NPR still exists over Twitter. Two weeks later, as _The New York Times_ reported, he proposed a federal budget "slashing federal funding to the Corporation for Public Broadcasting... to $0 by 2023." Trump is turning his personal grievances into attacks on journalism, education, and basic facts. In the age of massive conservative media conglomerates, public radio and PBS are the only sources of unbiased news in many parts of the country. [**If you believe public radio and public broadcasting are vital to our country -- if you believe we can 't let Trump get away with damaging America to soothe his ego yet again -- we need you to add your name with tens of thousands of engaged Democrats across the country who are standing up to save public radio.**](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5cbd/5360b1c8/2d417f58/b071ca8/1971415288/VEsH/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/publicradio-ja?source=pmp&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/mfa-pmp-ab") Thank YOU for being part of the fight, Progressive Majority | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5cbd/5360b1c8/2d417f58/b071ca8/1971415288/VEsE/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/publicradio-ja?source=pmp&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/mfa-pmp-ab")**

body:
The landscape after South Carolina:

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=488ae2ea5d6c4b61b68dd24a29ff0d7f&_e=Tg9EBWAZVue4cGMm2hG6Q2kodoVeaU2y1cZZj-vRf_fivICchV4lOblBeveyPOP3KuuAm2Z7afMY7eBJvSvAASxKYDF3OAHh5oLmjNCHBq1lawPte0rkiGhqR4c8B1YLkoXjMjiXunQvybDTgu_yld7NoED4xvh3Z9kqpcu_yD_aDx-XcHnOeQeOgLACk09449ceFrzOdZPQ0kV0fQkBE5JxcNz7JDFn-sRr82UWGcoQnpEN2lpCq2yaV8J8tu1zZwCX1xr1PcFpdyCEK9wv0sedx9k0ZSbJhaONfkzSCb0BrYM_i3Y9R_J8aVR2J6fTRq0PnA3vVlVPW1LBsi3zhMFwvwot1RCxJ9RL1W5bsRRjGtYZhB60_XLX5sPh-Ms4) Hi there, it's Cassie Henry, National Deputy States Director for Mike Bloomberg -- Here's the most important conclusion to draw from last night's results: South Carolina was the last contest where Mike's name wasn't on the ballot -- and the last chance for the other candidates to compete without going up against the coalition we're building together. [**The goal now is to stay focused, show up, and reach new voters in every state that remains -- starting with Super Tuesday. Can you join us at an event near you?**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=488ae2ea5d6c4b61b68dd24a29ff0d7f&_e=Tg9EBWAZVue4cGMm2hG6Q2kodoVeaU2y1cZZj-vRf_fivICchV4lOblBeveyPOP3KuuAm2Z7afMY7eBJvSvAASxKYDF3OAHh5oLmjNCHBq1lawPte0rkiGhqR4c8B1YLkoXjMjiXunQvybDTgu_ylQKNF_6rac1mjjQZENt9RrBHXHhFwTYEztIogEc6E6RIDs5d0BbgDEjN1H9kTW5OhWP6oIqfmkMP4VYWx9XvS7mocQCUQ1tuUKye6-Wt3J0CiT_olnO3b0oAVdDGza1LOvm5V8kFyBkzIOo9VxSLjZ4jFBdOvqRQczTD7Htnh6t7jm0457LpCG_RrRmeVqdRamReL2twHi_6IQ5MGEs3Ltu7XoMxEbNV_jp_kJXrqn1g) Here's our opportunity as we head into Super Tuesday and beyond:
* Only around 4% of pledged delegates have been decided
* On Tuesday alone the votes that come in will decide more than 1,300 pledged delegates
* After Tuesday, almost two thirds of the delegates will still be in play

| [FIND AN EVENT »](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=488ae2ea5d6c4b61b68dd24a29ff0d7f&_e=Tg9EBWAZVue4cGMm2hG6Q2kodoVeaU2y1cZZj-vRf_fivICchV4lOblBeveyPOP3KuuAm2Z7afMY7eBJvSvAASxKYDF3OAHh5oLmjNCHBq1lawPte0rkiGhqR4c8B1YLkoXjMjiXunQvybDTgu_ylYE_T4ZBntknFiROONWiqCRRmCOyLXpxqAsbNEa32T0gJEf58eflxZoOa2STdYfwTYL2HcZoormj_XnoBE5ehtTW6bG3iZfz9BAXpMHiEtb1h5z-Lq170vdkFmUdC2r4FhXs6mxLJK2sXVKPj7UGpUx4RyhiW7c-nveJ1N92OewcVKxmdrEEHjMp90k2bS6CKVA0iVDAvgkHQi_piW3DJeyUcq4iiIA_lX201GcTddvY)
---
The delegate math at this point tells us that anything can happen -- which means it's up to us and how we pull together.
We've got tremendous energy across the country to get out the vote for Tuesday and build momentum for what's ahead. Thousands of volunteers are showing up to talk to their neighbors and host events, and millions of voters are hearing about Mike's unmatched record and his plan to get big things done.
**Sign up to volunteer today and help us turn out the vote for Mike on Tuesday:**
[**https://events.mikebloomberg.com**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=488ae2ea5d6c4b61b68dd24a29ff0d7f&_e=Tg9EBWAZVue4cGMm2hG6Q2kodoVeaU2y1cZZj-vRf_fivICchV4lOblBeveyPOP3KuuAm2Z7afMY7eBJvSvAASxKYDF3OAHh5oLmjNCHBq1lawPte0rkiGhqR4c8B1YLkoXjMjiXunQvybDTgu_yldz_xHqwQseeml0TVkJhCCuT-4A-quf0e0nsSxolIB5VubFj_ndxeh8UmzFrAPwsrRQgHircMJKsP7-L2OKtUqE3a8Zv9HalYyyq7SbVYjqFiARV9nAN0QqTt4r6-VyaDhUV5-8RmAIcnIDTRNw4RruoxrL10Sdk0PVmvWfqnsv7g3j2FfS5yOg4dCeWyxN2KUWFRwhU7XDmPOmP-580mKMoRY6ziv9kbFFlm9je06vj)
With the vast majority of delegates still to be decided and the most dangerous president of our lifetimes to defeat, we have a clear game plan: Get out there, keep building our powerful coalition, and win.
We’re just getting started.
\- Cassie Henry
National Deputy States Director, Bloomberg 2020

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=488ae2ea5d6c4b61b68dd24a29ff0d7f&_e=Tg9EBWAZVue4cGMm2hG6QyhdKJfBIBd3zi3GG507s1Fiy2-80_R40nzD4tFDzGsImfV8M3D5qXKIOebdemtQH8qNJxe8HbUXrtr5uN7TCDKL_wB9vG64n5RImcWDodb37Pui67NQZwRxNXfI_QWeWQoSYCsTNPLSDeDAc3xLaSVGYCt42I1qSnMLfKtcSJXWZE1aoQxtOGxlleUSZEe9wrF1pUjRD9MBGXPGM7SFGQKD6l4sKsv83AxOIuksUhF4xFiQeN5k_-XtZzEbwhJNvg%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=488ae2ea5d6c4b61b68dd24a29ff0d7f&_e=Tg9EBWAZVue4cGMm2hG6QwF4ABLdOK_gv0q6R9t52wv_RgrslfGOUTmxUuBp8klyHtgN4mc-93G6w7k35COCj83EHuzcHeRsl8zJpqQVOIbkJ7Dxq34lbo4FCp7ivRxA9GIsOob1Ggu-WzwfZXzWZmgJmAqCRcPTsbLKsmFwe2WBj3sJ6AlKH28cUU6wJZVCytBr6d5NjdBx-9vzRFHHmDrba6y1VhY8uAXohopDequJ59j6fz0OZqGaU0abn5hdQUC2iMSlUIWChj4eEpJASQ%3D%3D)

subject: I have good news.

body:
| | |

| We did it again, team. **Last night, we officially crossed our $150,000 February goal!** For the second month in a row, this team has stepped up in a major way. First, we successfully hit an ambitious fundraising goal in January. And now, thanks to you, we've followed it up by reaching another important end-of-month goal in February. In the early months of this re-election campaign, it's clear that we've gotten off to a very strong start. Please know how grateful I am to have your support. Thank you for being a part of this grassroots movement that we're building together. I'm excited for what's to come in the months ahead. Thanks again,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_x_20200301_CB_20200301-x-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

body:
Friend,

Our team won't stop working until polls close at 7pm on March 3rd and we need your help. Let's send Nancy Pelosi and Lizzie Fletcher a message by making sure that every Republican in CD7 casts their ballot on Tuesday for Wesley Hunt. How can you make that happen?

**GOTV Rally**

Friend, we're hosting one final GOTV Rally tomorrow evening from 6:00pm-7:00pm. Stop by to grab one last yard sign, help us with phone-banking or bring an undecided voter to to meet Wesley! Pizza and soda will be provided!

**Block Walking and Phone Banking**
But Friend, even if you're unable to make it tomorrow night, you can still help us reach out to undecided voters. Stop by our office to phone bank or block walk!
**Block Walking**
Time: 10:00am-6:00pm
Location: 11511 Katy Freeway, #105
Contact: chris@wesleyfortexas.com

**Phone Banking**
Time: 10:00am-7:00pm
Location: 11511 Katy Freeway, #105
Contact: chris@wesleyfortexas.com

**Election Night Party**
And finally, after all votes are cast, we hope you'll stop by our Election Night Party on Tuesday from 7:00pm-10:00pm.

Thank you for all of your continued help and support! We hope to see you at one of our upcoming activities over the next few days.

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

name: Team Kennedy
subject: did you have a moment to read Joe's note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
|
---
| | Hey friend, it was a busy February, and we know there was a lot going on yesterday. So we want to bring this note Joe wrote to the top of your email inbox. (Bonus: we added a photo of Joe writing out the notes he mentioned at the very bottom!) \- Team Kennedy Forwarded Message [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903b4/55b66746/23521ee1/80fc646/455758046/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/") Hey just finished sending out some handwritten thank you notes to folks I've met on the road, and I wanted to send you a note of gratitude before February comes to a close. **This has been such an important month for our team, our campaign, our coalition. Here's what I'm especially grateful for right now:** The warmth I'm greeted with on the trail, be it a pizza shop in Springfield, a convenience store in Chelsea, or a town hall in Peabody. The hundreds of new faces we have seen at the State Democratic Caucuses, which have long been an insider's game, coming out to support this movement. The new volunteers who show up at events, week after week, dedicating their time to help us organize, make phone calls, and get the word out for this critical election. The outpouring of support I received during the first primary debate, where 300 people were gathered, holding signs, chanting in the freezing rain, and the reception afterward. And the supporters like you, who read these emails. You take the time to read our message, to take action, to pitch in your hard-earned dollars - it's humbling. It's abundantly clear that we are building something special here - in every corner of this state. And I'm so grateful for your support. **Let's continue building our team, our campaign, our coalition. Together I know we can win and accomplish the change we want to see and deserve.** Grateful, each and every day. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903b4/55b66746/23521ee1/80fc647/455758046/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-03-01-gratitude&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$9](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903b4/55b66746/23521ee1/80fc640/455758046/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=2020-03-01-gratitude&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903b4/55b66746/23521ee1/80fc641/455758046/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIxNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-03-01-gratitude&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$30](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903b4/55b66746/23521ee1/80fc642/455758046/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjMwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=30&refcode=2020-03-01-gratitude&refcode2=express-buttons")

subject: ✅ ON THE BALLOT
body:
With signatures from every county and over 5200 total, we made our outsider run for Congress official this week. Let's keep up this momentum!

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D5xyR_lL1nk&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489
On Monday, we were the first campaign in our race (and second in the entire state) to file. I'm humbled by the amount of support from our volunteers and supporters who put in the effort and made sure we qualified with 3500 signatures over the minimum.

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489
Hello

This week was one for the books. After a year collecting support and signatures, we're officially on the ballot in this congressional race. We're one step closer to keeping this seat
RED, sending a conservative outsider to Congress, and building a new Republican majority in Washington.

But I need your help to make it all happen...

With just over THREE MONTHS left, it's time to get involved and be the difference in this election
⤵️ (https://emojipedia.org/right-arrow-curving-down/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489)
REQUEST A BARN SIGN (https://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489)
KNOCK DOORS (https://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489)
HOST A GET TOGETHER (https://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. 92 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489) today!
BUILDING OUR NETWORK

Exciting week topped by officially filing to run for Congress. So glad to have signatures and overwhelming support from every county across the district. Also grateful for the support of local conservatives like Jo Ann Bargenquast who hosted a terrific get together in Shelby.

Spent today and yesterday with my family and team knocking doors. Let me know here (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489) if you'd like to join us at the doors!
RECENT COVERAGE

"It takes an act of Congress for someone in the VA system in Des Moines to do something different than Phoenix. We need to give the VA hospitals a chance to innovate on their own. And one of the solutions I hear from Iowans is let veterans go to different places for routine care but let the VA specialize in things that are needed: PTS or amputations."
UP NEXT

Looking forward to speaking with local conservatives at the Hardin County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/HardinCountyRepublicans/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489) in Iowa Falls and the Western Iowa Young Republicans (https://www.facebook.com/events/226169261757596/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489) in Carroll. I'll also be making my way across the district and continuing to meet and listen to Iowans at their front doors, coffee shops, and local hangouts.

STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489

On the issues:
* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489)
* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c860a3d341-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c860a3d341-25822489)

clean_body: With signatures from every county and over 5200 total, we made our outsider run for Congress official this week. Let's keep up this momentum! On Monday, we were the first campaign in our race (and second in the entire state) to file. I'm humbled by the amount of support from our volunteers and supporters who put in the effort and made sure we qualified with 3500 signatures over the minimum. Hello This week was one for the books. After a year collecting support and signatures, we're officially on the ballot in this congressional race. We're one step closer to keeping this seat RED, sending a conservative outsider to Congress, and building a new Republican majority in Washington. But I need your help to make it all happen... With just over THREE MONTHS left, it's time to get involved and be the difference in this election ⤵️ () REQUEST A BARN SIGN () KNOCK DOORS () HOST A GET TOGETHER () As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you. Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months. I appreciate your continued support. Your neighbor, p.s. 92 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support () today! BUILDING OUR NETWORK Exciting week topped by officially filing to run for Congress. So glad to have signatures and overwhelming support from every county across the district. Also grateful for the support of local conservatives like Jo Ann Bargenquast who hosted a terrific get together in Shelby. Spent today and yesterday with my family and team knocking doors. Let me know here () if you'd like to join us at the doors! RECENT COVERAGE "It takes an act of Congress for someone in the VA system in Des Moines to do something different than Phoenix. We need to give the VA hospitals a chance to innovate on their own. And one of the solutions I hear from Iowans is let veterans go to different places for routine care but let the VA specialize in things that are needed: PTS or amputations." UP NEXT Looking forward to speaking with local conservatives at the Hardin County GOP () in Iowa Falls and the Western Iowa Young Republicans () in Carroll. I'll also be making my way across the district and continuing to meet and listen to Iowans at their front doors, coffee shops, and local hangouts. Kathy
